name: Marcel Iureș presents Romania's Enigmas
overview: Acclaimed Romanian actor Marcel Iures will dig into a series of unanswered enigmas arising from the Romania's history, geology, castles, who-done-it crimes, celestial lights, mental derangements and hidden religious rites.

trailers.title: Marcel Iureș prezintă Enigmele României | Din 29 octombrie, în exclusivitate la HISTORY Channel
